title: No Mace
description:
A datapack that deletes the mace and heavy core. 
Created for people that sees this weapon as overpowered.
body:
### Salutations!

I’m okipiak, an amateur content creator. In this project, I’ve made it so you cannot get mace, or heavy core in any way. Feel free to add this to your server.

## I created this datapack because I couldn't find anything like it elsewhere.

![No Mace Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f5d3d295b793671ed9e6ef012a44e0672a1c9e.png)

### ⚠️ !WARNING! ⚠️

**PLEASE USE VERSION 1.4+ OF THE DATAPACK!!! older versions won't work for long!**

## Now you can also use this datapack on versions 1.20.5-1.20.6

How? On these versions there is a built-in datapack that adds 1.21 content. But you need to enable it first, and then add this datapack.

**This datapack removes the Heavy Core from vault loot tables and disables the crafting recipe for the Mace. Additionally, it automatically deletes any existing Maces and Heavy Cores from players' inventories. However, this item deletion feature can be toggled using commands:**

To enable automatic item deletion (default setting):

```
/scoreboard players set DeleteItems NoMace 1
```


To disable automatic item deletion:

```
/scoreboard players set DeleteItems NoMace 0
```


Please note that any value other than 0 or 1 will not have any effect.
